name: BBQ Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sage, allspice, coriander, nutmeg, peppercorns and season salt in a food processor. Pulse until the spices are well combined.
2. Pat the pork roast dry and press the spice mixture onto the fat cap of the roast.
3. Roast the pork in a dome BBQ grill using indirect heat until the internal temperature reaches 160°F.
- Alternatively, you can roast the pork directly under the grill with coals placed on either side of the pan. The roasting time should be about 90 minutes.
4. During the last 30 minutes of roasting, combine applesauce and brown sugar in a small bowl. Coat the top of the roast with this mixture.
5. Continue roasting until the internal temperature reaches 170°F. Use all of the applesauce mixture before removing the roast from the grill.
6. Remove the roast from the grill and let it rest for 15 minutes before carving.
